description: Add killer micro-features to quantube (video streaming), quantneon (photo sharing), and quantedits (editor). For quantube: picture-in-picture controller, chapters/timestamps manager, watch later queue, quality selector. For quantneon: story highlights manager, close friends list, vanish mode, photo maps. For quantedits: multi-track timeline engine, transitions library, text animations, export presets.
steps: Create apps/quantube/src/services/pip-controller.service.ts - PictureInPictureService with enter(), exit(), toggle(), isSupported(), onResize(). Manage PiP window state

Create apps/quantube/src/services/chapters.service.ts - ChaptersService with addChapter(timestamp, title), removeChapter(id), getChapters(videoId), seekToChapter(id). Auto-generate from description timestamps
Create apps/quantube/src/services/watch-later.service.ts - WatchLaterService with add(videoId), remove(videoId), getQueue(), reorder(fromIndex, toIndex), markWatched(videoId). Persist queue state

Create apps/quantube/src/services/quality-selector.service.ts - QualitySelectorService with getAvailableQualities(videoId), setQuality(quality), getPreferred(), setAutoQuality(enabled). Support 360p-4K + auto

Create apps/quantneon/src/services/story-highlights.service.ts - StoryHighlightsService with createHighlight(name, coverUrl), addStory(highlightId, storyId), removeStory(), reorder(), getHighlights(userId)

Create apps/quantneon/src/services/close-friends.service.ts - CloseFriendsService with add(userId), remove(userId), getList(), isCloseFriend(userId), shareToCloseFriends(postId). Manage exclusive sharing
Create apps/quantneon/src/services/vanish-mode.service.ts - VanishModeService with enable(conversationId), disable(), isEnabled(), onMessageSeen(messageId). Auto-delete messages after seen
Create apps/quantneon/src/services/photo-maps.service.ts - PhotoMapsService with addLocation(photoId, lat, lng), getPhotosInArea(bounds), getHeatmap(), getLocationHistory(). Cluster nearby photos

Create apps/quantedits/src/services/timeline.service.ts - TimelineService with addTrack(type), removeTrack(id), addClip(trackId, clip), trimClip(), splitClip(), moveClip(). Multi-track audio/video/text
Create apps/quantedits/src/services/transitions.service.ts - TransitionsService with getAvailable(), apply(clipA, clipB, transition, duration), preview(). Support fade, dissolve, wipe, zoom, slide
Create apps/quantedits/src/services/text-animations.service.ts - TextAnimationsService with create(text, style, animation), getPresets(), setKeyframes(). Support typewriter, fade-in, bounce, slide-up

Create apps/quantedits/src/services/export-presets.service.ts - ExportPresetsService with getPresets(), createCustom(settings), exportVideo(timeline, preset). Presets for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, 4K
Create vitest tests for all 12 new services
acceptance_criteria: 12 new service classes across 3 apps with full TypeScript types
All files pass strict TypeScript compilation
verification: NODE_OPTIONS='' npx vitest run apps/quantube/src/__tests__/ apps/quantneon/src/__tests__/ apps/quantedits/src/__tests__/
Run tsc verification on new files
